Notice Of Motion Andm Otion To Quash Subpoena For Medical Records;
Off Calendar Dec-11-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
John Murcko for plaintiff and moving party: Donal Hill
Brian Leach for defendant and opposing party: Bruce Lee Roby

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Donald Hill's motion to quash medical records subpoena is granted in part. The subpoena is modified to only require production of records from January 1, 2003 to the present. Records relating to heart disease and cholesterol need not be produced. Similarly, records relating to mental health treatment need not be produced absent a showing of subject matter relevance. The request for monetary sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-15-2006 Continued To Jan-22-07 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion Andm Otion To Compel Deft To Produce Documents,
Off Calendar Nov-17-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Donald Hill's motion to compel production of documents is moot. All requests for monetary sanctions are denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
